parts.text: Can you tell me how the payment program works for new and existing accounts?
I need guidance on the payment program to better manage my mobile bill.
I want to check if I can join the payment program for my account.
Could you give me a detailed explanation of the payment program offerings?
I’d like to know if the payment program allows splitting payments over multiple dates.
Can you provide information on payment program scheduling and limits?
I’m interested in learning how the payment program impacts my bill each month.
I want to ask about the Fido payment program and its options for my plan.
Can you check if my account is currently enrolled in a payment program?
I need help understanding the benefits of being on the payment program.
I’m trying to find out more about the payment program terms and conditions.
Could you explain how to sign up for the account payment program?
I want to know if the payment program offers any flexibility for late payments.
Can you tell me the difference between the standard bill and the payment program?
I need clarification on how the payment program works for outstanding
balances
I’d like to review the options available under the payment program.
How does the payment program affect my billing cycle?
I’m interested in knowing if I’m eligible for any payment programs.
I have questions about the monthly payment program for my mobile service.
Can you provide details on enrolling in a payment program?
I want to understand the terms of your payment program.
Could you walk me through the available payment program plans?
I’m calling to ask questions regarding the account payment program.
Can you explain how the payment program works and what benefits it includes?
I would like to know more about your payment program options for my account.
